ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category of the lead */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific product of the lead */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan requested */,
  "status_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status code of the lead */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the lead */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch handling the lead */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the lead was last updated */,
  "lead_nbg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead's NBG (National Business Group) */,
  "lead_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead's zone */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the lead was generated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the lead was generated */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the lead was generated */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the potential customer */,
  "customer_contact" TEXT /* Contact details of the customer */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the employee assigned to the lead */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date when the lead was closed */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the lead */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the lead record for versioning purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_status_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_code_id") REFERENCES status_codes ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_lead_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_lead_nbg_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_nbg_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., MSME, Retail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the product */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term length for the loan product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status code */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., New Lead, Approved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Next action required for the lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., EPL Branch, Website) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Online, Offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the branch */,
  "branch_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the zone covers */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the zone */,
  "zone_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zonal manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)
